name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-32
title: workspace-tree.py has mojibake/corrupted UTF-8 box-drawing characters
description: scripts/workspace-tree.py line 217 contains double-UTF8-encoded bytes (mojibake) for vertical bar (should be '│', stored as 6 bytes 'c3 a2 c2 94 c2 82'), line 219 same for connectors (should be '└─', '├─'), and line 72 annotation value for registry.json says 'name â path map' (should be 'name → path map'). When workspace-tree.py renders the tree it prints garbled characters in any terminal that decodes UTF-8 correctly. The file is declared UTF-8 by file(1). Root cause appears to be a past edit that re-encoded UTF-8 bytes as Latin-1 then re-encoded as UTF-8. Replace with proper Unicode box-drawing characters.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
